capabilities.name: Wiki Past Knowledge
capabilities.description: Retrieve prior decisions, patterns, pitfalls, and gaps before planning.

capabilities.name: Newsfeed MCP
capabilities.description: Query recent articles, trends, source health, and wiki candidates.

capabilities.name: AgentSearch
capabilities.description: Optional self-hosted search and page extraction connector.

capabilities.name: Product Discovery
capabilities.description: Evaluate product ideas, customer scenarios, SaaS positioning, validation tests, and market gaps.

capabilities.name: Deep Research
capabilities.description: Research external context, competitors, prior art, and current ecosystem signals before product decisions.

chains.name: Default Newswiki Startup
steps: Newsfeed MCP when current information matters

chains.name: Product Discovery
steps: Capability MCP for research and product-analysis skills
Wiki MCP for prior product decisions and pitfalls
Newsfeed MCP or web research for current market signals
write back durable product decisions or gaps
